subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, which have been sent down in truth from the heaven of exalted glory, and which summon mankind unto the recognition of His Most Exalted Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق من سماء عز رفیع و تدع الناس الی عرفان نفسه العلی
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
